The International Hotel &
Property Awards

2026 Applications Now Open

Home

For more than 17 years, The International Hotel & Property Awards have supported leading practices worldwide, creating a platform that brings together top names in the industry for an international celebration of design excellence. To be shortlisted is widely regarded as one of the highest forms of recognition within the profession.

As you may know, this is not just an entry into a competition, like other Awards. If your application is successfully shortlisted by the design et al Magazine panel, you’ll receive an extensive PR and editorial package throughout the year ahead of the Awards Ceremony in London.

Unlike many award programmes, this is more than a single event. Projects shortlisted by our editorial panel receive year-round coverage through a dedicated PR and editorial package, ahead of the Awards Ceremony in London. Our voting system also sets us apart: rather than being decided by a small judging group, the 2025 Awards attracted a record 121,000 industry professionals who cast their votes across a four-week period, each vote taking on average 38 minutes to complete. This ensures the results reflect the voice of the wider design community, making the process both fair and representative.

design et al only work with the world’s leading designers and as such only shortlist the projects that showcase the absolute pinnacle of design.

If you wish to speak to someone regarding The International Hotel & Property Awards, please email us at awards@design-et-al.com

Alternatively, call us on 0044 (0)1244 401932

To keep up to date with what’s happening in The International Hotel & Property Awards, simply click here and add your details – you can cancel or manage your subscription at any time using the links at the bottom of every email. We do not share information with other companies, so your details will not be shared.

Design Et Al
To enter the awards, call us on: +44 (0)1244 401932
The International Hotel &
Property Awards

OBJECTIVE, FAIR, A TRUE COMPETITION

DECIDED BY THE INDUSTRY ITSELF

Enter

The process is simple for submitting an application, please follow the steps below, making sure you have read and understood the terms and conditions, before submitting your entry:

Request the online application form by emailing awards@design-et-al.com
Reserve a shortlist meeting
Complete the application form for each project, this should take no longer than 10 minutes.
You will be prompted to attach the images to the form.
The awards team will confirm whether the submission was successful immediately after your reserved shortlist meeting.

PLEASE NOTE: Entry to the awards is free however if successful in reaching the shortlist stage, applicants are required to pay an administration fee and purchase two tickets to the awards ceremony.

A maximum of 12 projects will be shortlisted per category, therefore we advise that applications be submitted as soon as possible.

关于.text:
Design Et Al
To enter the awards, call us on: +44 (0)1244 401932
The International Hotel &
Property Awards

TO JUDGE DESIGN FAIRLY YOU NEED TO PUT
YOUR WORK OUT THERE FOR THE DESIGN
WORLD TO VIEW, DEBATE AND CONSIDER

About

The International Hotel & Property Awards, are hosted by design et al, a leading UK interior design magazine. At design et al, our aim is to commend design, recognise talent, create opportunities and quite simply to offer inspiration. The International Hotel & Property Awards offer a number of different categories covering hospitality design, interior design and property design and to meet the demand of our clients, more categories have, again, been added to the schedule.

What makes our awards different to other design awards?

Like all design et al awards, The International Hotel & Property Awards are not judged by a panel. Shortlisted entries are presented online, and voting is open to industry professionals as well as design et al readers, clients and customers.

“Instead of a panel of 5 or 6 industry professionals we have quite literally thousands of industry professionals involved”, Design et al Publisher Joanne Beedles told us. “It is an incredible way to promote your work, reach a targeted global audience and ultimately sell your work.”

A unique part of our voting system, is that votes have to be cast in every single category, not just your own projects, this gives all shortlisted projects maximum publicity from international industry professionals.

Step with us into the world of luxury. Does your design cross the boundaries? Focusing on the commercial sector, we celebrate the best in design, and are looking for outstanding architecture and interior design.

The International Hotel & Property Awards offers a number of award categories.
Please visit the categories page for details.

If you wish to speak to someone regarding The International Hotel & Property Awards, please use the contact form below.

THE CATEGORIES

Categories

The International Hotel & Property Awards hosted by design et al, offer a number of different categories covering hotel and hospitality interior design and architecture. If you’re looking for residential categories, click here. Only 12 projects will be shortlisted per category, therefore we advise that applications be submitted as soon as possible. To register your interest in a specific category, simply click on each category below.
